title: Glow Banners
description: Lets you use glow ink sacs on banners to make them glow!
body:
# Glow Banners
This mod adds **Glowing Banners**! these can be acquired by using a _Glow Ink Sac_ on a banner, making the entire banner and its layers glow. An ink sac will similarly remove the glowing.

You can make individual layers glow by placing a glow ink sac in a loom with the banner, which will make the last applied layer glow. You can similarly remove the latest layers glowing with an ink sac.

This glowing applies to banners put on shields too!

![A variety of glowing banners with per layer glowing.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/r7G43arb/images/46844b9f499bed1a1d1305f7bbb337827ff8b5a2.png)
